recentArticles.title: Huge eight-figure sum troubled Liam Payne left son Bear, 9, after tragic death aged 31 revealed in court docs - the-sun.com
recentArticles.snippet: **LIAM Payne’s nine-year-old son is to be the sole beneficiary of the tragic singer’s £21million fortune, the High Court has agreed.**. Liam Payne’s son Bear is to be the sole beneficiary of the tragic singer’s £21million fortune, the High Court has agreed Credit: Getty. Cheryl and music industry lawyer Richard Bray were named as administrators of Liam’s estate in a grant of probate issued in Newcastle last year. The new Letters of Administration means that parts of the estate can potentially be spent to help Bear now — with the remainder required to be placed in trust for him until he is aged 18. ## KIM'S TEAM Kim Kardashian & Lewis Hamilton's World Cup plans with her son Saint ## The Skims mogul, 45 - a self-described "soccer mom" to 10-year-old Saint - and the Formula One racer, 41, have tentative plans to attend a World Cup game as one big happy family, a source told The U.S. Sun. Image 17: Liam Payne attends The Fashion Awards 2022.

recentArticles.title: Beyoncé and Jay-Z's rarely-seen son Sir joins siblings in intimate family video - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: * Beyonce released a behind-the-scenes family video on Father's Day showing Jay-Z's hair transformation journey with the help of their family and friends. * The video included never-before-seen footage of Jay-Z with his rarely seen son, Sir, as well as clips of Blue Ivy and Rumi dancing at Jay-Z's concert in Philadelphia. * Jay-Z decided to grow out his hair to show solidarity with his daughter Blue, who was feeling insecure about her own hair, and the transformation process took six days with the help of his family. The video featured several throwback clips of Jay-Z with his family, including never-before-seen footage with his nine-year-old son, Sir. Unlike his sisters, the Carter's only son prefers to keep out of the spotlight, but clips included one of him on the beach with his dad, and another of Jay-Z holding Sir and Rumi as toddlers. * ### Why Beyoncé's son Sir Carter isn't in the spotlight like his sisters Rumi and Blue Ivy.

recentArticles.title: New Apple TV 4K is coming this fall with three new features: report - 9to5Mac
recentArticles.snippet: # New Apple TV 4K is coming this fall with three new features: report. The wait for a new Apple TV 4K has been longer than expected, but the latest report from *Bloomberg* indicates it’s on track for a fall launch with three new features. ## Siri AI, revised remote, and more Apple Intelligence features rumored for Apple TV 4K, with new HomePods coming too. Much of what he reported has been covered extensively before, but one standout was an update on two long-rumored products: new Apple TV 4K and HomePod mini. > Finally, the new Apple TV and HomePod mini with Apple Intelligence are both in very advanced testing. The new Apple TV 4K in particular has been long anticipated. Now that we know the full Apple Intelligence story in iOS 27, there are a variety of new AI features that could fit well on tvOS too—beyond Siri. What’s on your wishlist for the new Apple TV 4K and/or HomePod models? ### Apple TV 4K.

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z's Roc Nation Scores Major Win in Tony Buzbee Legal War - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: # Jay-Z's Roc Nation Scores Major Win in Tony Buzbee Legal War. ## Roc Nation & Jay Z Score Legal Victory in Diddy Fallout Feud. The bitter legal war between **Jay-Z** and attorney **Tony Buzbee** just took another turn and this round went to Roc Nation. The litigation involves claims Roc Nation and lawyers working with Jay-Z's camp improperly targeted Buzbee's clients amid the fallout from the Diddy scandal and later allegations involving Jay-Z. The lawsuits were among several legal offshoots spawned by the escalating feud between Buzbee and Jay-Z's team after Buzbee filed a now withdrawn lawsuit that included claims of sexual assault against the rap mogul. Jay-Z denied the allegations and aggressively fought back, claiming Buzbee of pursuing false allegations and launching multiple legal challenges against the attorney. Now, a judge ruled the state lacks personal jurisdiction over Roc Nation and dismissed the claims against the company.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞與周杰倫無關，主要報導Jay-Z的Roc Nation在與律師Tony Buzbee的法律戰中取得勝利。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Grew Out His Hair for Blue Ivy - The Cut
recentArticles.snippet: Jay-Z Grew Out His Hair for Blue Ivy. Things you buy through our links may earn *Vox Media* a commission. # Jay-Z Grew Out His Hair for Blue Ivy. By  Olivia Craighead, a news writer for The Cut who covers pop culture and celebrity. On Father’s Day, a few weeks after the rapper appeared at the Roots Picnic last month sporting a combed-out Afro, Beyoncé and her hair-product brand, Cécred, shared a seven-minute video titled “The Blueprint.” In it, she narrated the sentimental story behind her husband’s locs and why he decided to comb them out after more than eight years. “I thought it was always beautiful that the real reason Jay grew out his hair was to show Blue that her hair was like his hair,” Beyoncé said over footage of Jay and their oldest daughter. Eight years later, ahead of Jay-Z’s appearance with the Roots in Philadelphia, he told Beyoncé that he wanted to comb out his hair in order to honor his father, who wore an Afro and loved Philadelphia sports.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導Jay-Z為女兒Blue Ivy留髮及為紀念父親而梳開頭髮的故事。

recentArticles.title: Rick Baker Set For Locarno Honorary Award - Deadline
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘An American Werewolf In London’ & Michael Jackson’s ‘Thriller’ Make-Up Artist Rick Baker Set For Locarno Honorary Award. Rick Baker, the veteran make-up artist behind Michael Jackson’s *Thriller* music video and Hollywood classics like *The Nutty Professor* and *An American Werewolf in London*, will be awarded the honorary Vision Award at this year’s Locarno Film Festival. Baker will be handed the award at the festival’s Piazza Grande on August 12. “Rick Baker was responsible for a Copernican revolution in cinema: visionary and revolutionary, he opened new paths for the imagination of entire generations, showing what it truly means to witness physical transmutation on the big screen,” Locarno director Giona A. ### Asia Argento Set For Locarno Lifetime Achievement Award. Presenting the Vision Award in Locarno to a pioneer and innovator like him, an absolute genius and incomparable craftsman, is an honour through which the Festival celebrates the infinite possibilities of cinema and its bag of tricks.”. ## Must Read Stories.
recentArticles.summary: 資深化妝師Rick Baker將在盧卡諾影展獲頒榮譽視覺獎，表彰他在電影特效化妝領域的貢獻，此新聞與周杰倫無直接關聯。

Returning to Parklife 16 years after his first appearance, the crowd for Harris was huge, potentially bigger than Charli xcx last year - and that's saying somethi - facebook.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Parklife went out with a BANG... ## Manchester Evening News's Post. ### **Manchester Evening News**. Parklife went out with a BANG last night as superstar DJ Calvin Harris created history at Heaton Park. Returning to Parklife 16 years after his first appearance, the crowd for Harris was huge, potentially bigger than Charli xcx last year - and that's saying something. Blending seamlessly between his back catalogue of massive hits - we're talking 'We Found Love', 'How Deep is Your Love' and 'One Kiss' to name just a few, there was no lapse at all as Calvin Harris showed the crowd how it's done. "Manchester you sound so good," he said encouragingly, as if to make sure they keeping up with his high-energy, whistle-stop tour through the last twenty years. Image 9: Parklife goes out with a bang as Zara Larsson and Calvin Harris create history. Parklife goes out with a bang as Zara Larsson and Calvin Harris create history. Manchester we need a over 30s parklife ???

recentArticles.title: Vice Ganda salutes queens and inspires fearless self-expression in new song "Talak" - ABS-CBN Corporate
recentArticles.snippet: # Vice Ganda salutes queens and inspires fearless self-expression in new song "Talak". June 23, 2026 AT 07:27 PM. ***Out on music streaming platforms this Friday (June 26)***. Vice Ganda celebrates fearless queens and encourages self-expression without limits in his upcoming single, “Talak,” which will drop on music streaming platforms on Friday (June 26). The Unkabogable Superstar gave “It’s Showtime” viewers a peek at the empowering track last Monday (June 15), debuting its catchy lyrics and high-energy beat in time for the kickoff of the noontime show’s comeback pageant segment, “Miss Q&A: Reyna Talak-Era 2026.”. “Talak” is a celebration of individuality, courage, and confidence. Vice Ganda composed the feel-good anthem with Chris Lopez and Kiko Salazar. Chris Lopez and Jonathan Manalo produced the song with supervising producer and StarPop label head Roque “Rox” Santos. Celebrate owning one’s voice with Vice Ganda’s “Talak” single, out this Friday (June 26). DOWNLOAD ALL 4 PHOTOS FROM THIS ARTICLE.

recentArticles.snippet: ### Taylor Swift's Rhode Island Mansion Dazzles with Fireworks, Amid Bachelorette Speculation. # Kris Jenner Shouts Out Kardashians' Exes on Father’s Day. **Kris Jenner** gave a wide-ranging Father’s Day tribute Sunday ... and it included several of her famous family’s exes, current co-parents, and loved ones in a single star-packed collage. The collage highlighted **Kanye West**, **Scott Disick**, **Travis Scott**, **Tristan Thompson**, as well as her own exes **Caitlyn Jenner** and **Robert Kardashian Sr**. recentArticles.title: Virat Kohli Launches One8 Sportswear in Delhi with Signature ₹9,230 Shoe Tribute - Saptashwa TV
recentArticles.snippet: Virat Kohli has launched his latest venture One8 Sportswear at a global launch in Delhi to the huge audience of cricket fans, celebrities and industry leaders to celebrate. This is One8's first global launch as a brand and launch date that will go down in history within Agilitas Sports and will be the first time that One8 has become an independent label to launch a collection of high-performance cricket spikes, lifestyle shoes and apparel to be able to merge athletic function with city attire. The One8 Global Premiere in Delhi was more than a product launch; it was a celebration of Kohli’s legacy, his entrepreneurial vision, and the merging of sport, fashion and culture. With Kohli’s brand as One8 enters the next stage and as it goes through the transition from a product launch to a product launch, fans and consumers alike’ eyes and minds will be on board to see how Kohli’s brand will develop in the competitive sportswear arena.

recentArticles.title: Jelly Roll Lands Major TV Gig After Emotional Message To Bunnie XO - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # Jelly Roll Lands Major TV Gig After Emotional Message To Bunnie XO. * Country music star Jelly Roll is set to guest host "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" during Jimmy Kimmel's summer hiatus, alongside other celebrities like Tiffany Haddish and Rosie O'Donnell. * Jelly Roll's wife, Bunnie XO, recently discussed their marriage struggles on a podcast, revealing that they are parting ways amicably and continuing their IVF journey. * Jelly Roll publicly confirmed the truth of Bunnie's podcast statements, expressed love for her, and addressed rumors of infidelity, stating that he is open to dating and encouraging fans to reach out. According to Bunnie, tensions came to a head following an argument on Mother's Day. While she stressed that infidelity played no role in their breakup, she admitted that frustration led her to tell Jelly Roll to file for divorce. Later that same night, Jelly Roll addressed the situation during a concert in New York, telling fans that everything Bunnie discussed on her podcast was "the truth." The singer also used the moment to express his appreciation for his wife.

recentArticles.title: Jalen Brunson Tried to Get Mikal Bridges to End Viral IG Live Video, Shares Knicks SG's Reaction - Bleacher Report
recentArticles.snippet: # Jalen Brunson Tried to Get Mikal Bridges to End Viral IG Live Video, Shares Knicks SG's Reaction. There were several viral moments in the aftermath of the New York Knicks winning their first title in 53 years, and one was Mikal Bridges' hilarious Instagram livestream. Jalen Brunson said on *SportsCenter* that he tried to stop Bridges, but his efforts were fruitless. "I texted him, I said, 'Get off live," Brunson said (1:40 mark). "And he sent back, 'No,' in all caps. ### Brunson, Hart Confront Stephen A. Bridges seemingly enjoyed some celebratory drinks before jumping on a livestream, where he showed off his house and his jersey collection, sang to his dog and even called out Brunson's critics. OKC clearing out roster spot by sending Aaron Wiggins to Atlanta for two 2nd-round picks (Shams). ### Ranking Top No. 1 Picks 📊. How Dwight and Paolo stack up to the rest of the No. 1 overall picks since 2000 📲.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導主要講述NBA球員Mikal Bridges在紐約尼克隊奪冠後進行的病毒式Instagram直播，以及隊友Jalen Brunson試圖阻止他的趣事，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Top Stories: Apple Price Hikes Coming, 20th Anniversary iPhone Rumors, and More - MacRumors
recentArticles.snippet: # Top Stories: Apple Price Hikes Coming, 20th Anniversary iPhone Rumors, and More. While Apple held out as many other smartphone and computer manufacturers raised prices in the face of massive increases in memory and storage costs, CEO Tim Cook has signaled that Apple will soon have to follow suit as the "situation has become unsustainable.". In other news this week, rumors covered not just the iPhone 18 but also the 20th anniversary iPhone that's still over a year away, while Apple customers can some receive new perks with Chase credit cards and we went hands on with macOS Golden Gate to see what's new, so read on below for all the details on these stories and more! The iPhone 18 Pro and ‌iPhone 18 Pro‌ Max coming in September could be more expensive than the iPhone 17 Pro and ‌iPhone 17 Pro‌ Max, while prices on iPads and Macs could also go up in the near future.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導蘋果產品漲價及新款iPhone傳聞。
